lines.name: Foulborn Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Original Sin

explicitModifiers.text: All Elemental Damage Converted to Chaos Damage

lines.flavourText:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.

lines.name: Foulborn Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

mutatedModifiers.text: Rare and Unique Enemies within 120 metres have Minimap Icons

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Foulborn Headhunter

mutatedModifiers.text: Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.25 seconds

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Foulborn Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters

mutatedModifiers.text: Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.25 seconds
Rare and Unique Enemies within 120 metres have Minimap Icons

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Foulborn Mageblood

explicitModifiers.text: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed

mutatedModifiers.text: Rightmost (2-4) Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you

lines.flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

lines.name: Mageblood

implicitModifiers.text: Item sells for much more to vendors

explicitModifiers.text: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost (2-4) Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed

lines.flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

lines.name: Ynda's Stand

explicitModifiers.text: Gain Ward instead of (50-60)% of Armour and Evasion Rating from Equipped Body Armour

lines.flavourText:
When all else was burning and overrun,
she held the bridge to the very end.

lines.name: Stranglegasp
lines.flavourText: Death's approach brings clarity.

lines.name: Nimis

explicitModifiers.text: Projectiles are fired in random directions

lines.flavourText:
Too much of something is bad enough;
too much of nothing is just as tough.

lines.name: Foulborn Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters

mutatedModifiers.text: Eat a Soul when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy, no more than once every 0.25 seconds

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Enmity's Embrace

explicitModifiers.text: Take (300-600) Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%

lines.flavourText:
In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

lines.name: Foulborn Xoph's Blood

explicitModifiers.text: Cover Enemies in Ash when they Hit you

mutatedModifiers.text: (5-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage

lines.flavourText:
We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.

lines.name: Foulborn Xoph's Heart

mutatedModifiers.text: (5-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage

lines.flavourText:
His is our heart.
To its beat we all are driven.

lines.name: Foulborn Badge of the Brotherhood

explicitModifiers.text: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
(7-10)% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
(20-25)% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
(20-25)% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive

mutatedModifiers.text: 2% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge

lines.flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

lines.name: Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

lines.flavourText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

lines.name: Foulborn Le Heup of All

implicitModifiers.text: Adds 1 to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks

lines.flavourText:
Existence is infinite
A weave of the living and dead
Beyond the understanding
Of the many mortal threads

lines.name: Putembo's Mountain
lines.flavourText:
He surveyed his lands, green and vital,
watched with pride as his slaves quarried fine stone for his fortress,
and thanked the heavens for his many blessings.
But this pilgrimage to the peak was to be his last.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.}

lines.name: Foulborn Berek's Respite

explicitModifiers.text: Adds (20-30) to (30-60) Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy

mutatedModifiers.text:
Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing (5-6)% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock

lines.flavourText:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

lines.name: Uzaza's Valley
lines.flavourText:
Sheltered beneath thick ice,
the river ferried fat fish towards the sea.
But the First King knew the river's secret,
and the fish were not the only ones who grew fat.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Mountain ring at a Vendor.}

lines.name: Defiance of Destiny

explicitModifiers.text: Gain (10-24)% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy

lines.flavourText:
The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

lines.name: Foulborn Defiance of Destiny

mutatedModifiers.text: Gain (15-36)% of Missing Unreserved Mana before being Hit by an Enemy

lines.flavourText:
The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

lines.name: Eternal Damnation

explicitModifiers.text: Gain additional Elemental Damage Reduction equal to half your Chaos Resistance
Maximum Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges is 0

lines.flavourText: The price of immortality is isolation.

lines.name: Lost Unity

explicitModifiers.text: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill

lines.flavourText:
All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

lines.name: Uzaza's Mountain
lines.flavourText:
The narrow path turned to rough rocks that led towards the sky.
One last obstacle in a life-long journey
to find a land they could call home.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Meadow and Valley ring at a Vendor.}

lines.name: Polaric Devastation

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% increased Duration of Ailments on Enemies
Left Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Ash for 5 seconds when you Ignite them
Right Ring slot: Cover Enemies in Frost for 5 seconds when you Freeze them

lines.flavourText:
Those that escaped the annihilating light
sank eternally into crushing darkness.

lines.name: Kalandra's Touch
lines.flavourText:
On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

lines.name: Curio of Consumption
lines.flavourText:
When hunger can never be satiated, the
act of eating becomes the only solace.

lines.name: Putembo's Meadow
lines.flavourText:
The fields were silent but for the plucking of fruits,
the rustling of leaves, and the breaking of stone.
No slave dared to speak or look the passing king in the eye.
No one... except Aul.

<default>{This item can be combined with a Mountain and Valley ring at a Vendor.}

lines.name: Replica Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: (20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Magic monsters
20% chance when you Kill a Magic Monster to gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

lines.flavourText:
"A type Delta test subject escaped with Prototype #18. He was last seen
ten times the height of a man and crashing straight through walls."
